name: TestJoinFrFrameEvent
title: TestJoinFrFrameEvent
syntax: long TestJoinFrFrameEvent (dword aSlotId, dword aBaseCycle, dword aCycleRepetition, dword aChannelMask)
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.

parameters.name: aFrame
parameters.description: Frame to be awaited as it is defined in the database.

parameters.name: aBaseCycle
parameters.description: Numeric base cycle. This value must be less than the repetition factor. Together with the repetition factor this value determines the "Cycle Multiplexing". Value range: 0...63

parameters.name: aCycleRepetition
parameters.description: Cycle repetition factor. Together with the base cycle this value determines the "Cycle Multiplexing". Value has to be a power to 2 (1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32 or 64).

description: For an example see function TestWaitForFrFrame.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
